pigmentation.reason: Visible pigmentation concern aligns with treatments targeting uneven tone.

uneven_texture.reason: Uneven texture can benefit from resurfacing or renewal-focused treatments.

redness.reason: Redness suggests prioritizing gentle calming treatments before aggressive procedures.

hair_density.reason: Hair density concerns align with scalp and hair restoration options.

dryness.reason: Dryness indicates hydration and skin barrier support may be useful.
